initial_candidates.sql:
WITH top_genres AS (
    SELECT g.genre_id, g.genre_name, COUNT(r.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
    WHERE r.rating > 8
    GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.genre_name
    ORDER BY movie_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
top_directors AS (
    SELECT d.name, COUNT(r.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
    JOIN movie_directors md ON m.movie_id = md.movie_id
    JOIN directors d ON md.director_id = d.director_id
    WHERE r.rating > 8
      AND g.genre_id IN (SELECT genre_id FROM top_genres)
    GROUP BY d.name
    ORDER BY movie_count DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
SELECT name, movie_count
FROM top_directors
ORDER BY movie_count DESC;

WITH top_genres AS (
    SELECT g.genre_name
    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
    WHERE r.rating > 8
    GROUP BY g.genre_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(r.movie_id) DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT d.name, COUNT(r.movie_id) AS movie_count
FROM ratings r
JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
JOIN movie_directors md ON m.movie_id = md.movie_id
JOIN directors d ON md.director_id = d.director_id
WHERE r.rating > 8
  AND g.genre_name IN (SELECT genre_name FROM top_genres)
GROUP BY d.name
ORDER BY movie_count DESC
LIMIT 4;

WITH top_genres AS (
    SELECT g.genre_id, g.genre_name, COUNT(*) AS genre_movie_count
    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
    WHERE r.rating > 8
    GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.genre_name
    ORDER BY genre_movie_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
),
top_directors AS (
    SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS movie_count
    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
    JOIN movie_directors md ON m.movie_id = md.movie_id
    JOIN directors d ON md.director_id = d.director_id
    WHERE r.rating > 8
      AND g.genre_id IN (SELECT genre_id FROM top_genres)
    GROUP BY d.name
    ORDER BY movie_count DESC
    LIMIT 4
)
SELECT name, movie_count
FROM top_directors;

JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id

WHERE r.rating > 8
  AND g.genre_name IN (SELECT genre_name FROM top_genres)
GROUP BY d.name

LIMIT 4;

    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id

top_directors AS (
    SELECT d.name, COUNT(r.movie_id) AS movie_count
    FROM ratings r
    JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id
    JOIN movie_genres mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id
    JOIN genres g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id
    JOIN movie_directors md ON m.movie_id = md.movie_id
    JOIN directors d ON md.director_id = d.director_id
